text: Patter is the open-source SDK that gives your AI agent a phone number.

evidence.quote: Patter is the open-source SDK that gives your AI agent a phone number.

text: The Patter SDK handles telephony, speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and real-time audio streaming when pointed at any function that returns a string.

evidence.quote: Point it at any function that returns a string, and Patter handles the rest: telephony, speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and real-time audio streaming.

text: Pipeline mode composes STT + LLM + TTS sequentially and inherits the latency of each provider plus the endpointing window.

evidence.quote: Pipeline mode composes STT + LLM + TTS sequentially and inherits the latency of each provider plus the endpointing window.

text: Patter provides Twilio and Telnyx parity for DTMF, transfer, AMD, voicemail drop, and recording, with both speech-to-speech (Realtime/ConvAI engines) and sandwich pipeline (STT → LLM → TTS) architectures from one API.

evidence.quote: Out of the box you get Twilio + Telnyx parity (DTMF, transfer, AMD, voicemail drop, recording), both architectures from one API — speech-to-speech (Realtime / ConvAI engines) and the sandwich pipeline (STT → LLM → TTS) — and production-grade barge-in / VAD / IVR primitives that work the same on every carrier.

issues.detail: 1 argument(s) not found in the quote/span — advisory only

text: The 4-line quickstart replaces 50 lines of glue code that would otherwise be written against a generic voice-agent toolkit.

evidence.quote: The 4-line quickstart above replaces 50 lines of glue you'd otherwise write against a generic voice-agent toolkit

issues.detail: quote spans a window `p034.s002`..`p034.s004` around the ref

text: Patter's Python and TypeScript SDKs are identical with the same surface, hooks, and events, allowing cross-runtime teams to ship the same agent twice without rewriting.

evidence.quote: the Python and TypeScript SDKs are identical — same surface, same hooks, same events — so cross-runtime teams ship the same agent twice without rewriting it.

text: Observability uses vendor-neutral OpenTelemetry tracing with a built-in dashboard and tunnel; no extra collector required.

evidence.quote: Observability is vendor-neutral OpenTelemetry tracing, plus a built-in dashboard and tunnel; no extra collector required.

text: Use engine=OpenAIRealtime() for the fastest turn UX, or pair the pipeline with low-latency providers such as Cerebras/Groq for the LLM and ElevenLabs Turbo v2.5 for TTS.

evidence.quote: For the fastest turn UX pick engine=OpenAIRealtime(), or pair the pipeline with low-latency providers such as Cerebras/Groq for the LLM and ElevenLabs Turbo v2.5 for TTS.

issues.detail: quote spans a window `p053.s005`..`p054.s002` around the ref

text: Whisper STT — on mulaw 8 kHz inputs Whisper routinely hallucinates short fillers

evidence.quote: Whisper STT — on mulaw 8 kHz inputs Whisper routinely hallucinates short fillers

text: For production, prefer OpenAITranscribeSTT (gpt-4o-transcribe) over Whisper STT because it is 10× faster, uses the same API key, and has no hallucination floor.

evidence.quote: For production prefer OpenAITranscribeSTT (gpt-4o-transcribe) — same OPENAI_API_KEY, 10× faster, no hallucination floor.

text: ElevenLabs free tier cannot access the library voice catalog via API, returning 402 Payment Required; users must set ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID to a voice they own or use one of 45 well-known names that resolve automatically to UUIDs.

evidence.quote: ElevenLabs free tier — the library voice catalog is not reachable via API (402 Payment Required).

text: Telnyx outbound calls return 403 D38 until the connection has an Outbound Profile attached in the Telnyx portal, though inbound and Call Control answer flows work without it.

evidence.quote: Telnyx outbound — calls will return 403 D38 until your connection has an "Outbound Profile" attached in the Telnyx portal.

text: Google Gemini free tier has a hard quota=0 on gemini-2.0-flash, requiring billing to be enabled on the project before using Gemini as the LLM.

evidence.quote: Google Gemini free tier — gemini-2.0-flash has a hard quota=0 on the free tier. Enable billing on the project before using Gemini as the LLM.
